IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (87968870.pdf)
SUMMARY: Energetic, Bilingual Human Resources Professional with over 11 years of experience in recruitment/retention, training and development, compensation and benefits, new hire orientation, mediation expertise, employee relations, labor agreements, regulatory compliance, and HR systems administration.
SKILLS: ADA, ADP, benefits, employee relations, human resource, HR, insurance, law enforcement, mediation, MS Office, SharePoint, organizational, performance management, personnel, policies, promotion, recruiting, employee handbooks, vendor management
